match.userMessage:
Cinematic film still. EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - CONTINUOUS

A wave rushes over her bare feet. Scarlett laughs, the sound carried by the breeze. The lipstick tube settles beside the embossed brand mark pressed into the wet sand. Golden-hour warmth kisses the scene while cool shadows define every edge.

MACRO DETAIL — Coral pigment on skin, tiny grains of sand clinging to the tube. Overhead flat lay: lipstick, shell, linen scrap, all arranged on pale board.

SCARLETT (V.O.)
Coral. Fresh. Yours.

SUPER: CORAL. OUT NOW.

The frame holds on the shoreline as another wave smooths the sand, leaving only the bright mark and the open horizon.. Art style: Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save. Mood: Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool. Lighting: Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast. No text, no titles, no subtitles, no watermarks, no letters, no words, no signs, no UI elements.
